textByHash.597229ec215781d81d5c5c0915b8a9a0f89f1473: Hello friend. I wish to slay evil and avail them of their loot! Take me to Burgh de Rott!
textByHash.62e654b30d6ec5ce1bb5c8727cbac728a98ca721: I think so? At least my heart knows courage and that should be sufficient for the meantime. I expect that when we get to Burgh de Rott, we'll be able to purchase suitable provisions.
textByHash.34fbe82bda8fc743fde52511e51d4b29dd1e66b4: Er...well, I've not heard mention of that fact, but I have faith that Saradomin will provide the means to furnish me with suitable weapons when I reach Burgh de Rott.
textByHash.4880cce926826884dcfc233c28fdc743277db759: I trust that you will help us to avoid them. You are a guide after all, aren't you? Anyway, you look like you can handle yourself. I presume you've fought such creatures before and won? How hard can it be?
textByHash.0a7fbe7315d8673b8990afe1e5c3a6af5c4535e4: I'm going down there to teach those vampyres a lesson or two. I've heard about the terrible conditions down there and I intend to put a stop to it.
textByHash.a8d82bd54685a23397f171324a230060cecb2a09: Let's just say that I'm somewhat experienced and I'm happy to take on my fair share of enemies. You don't need to worry about that.
textByHash.9e510e4efdad6c902980e39b27925539cf21bd0e: Hmmm, it seems that you have a follower. I think it may get lost on this journey if it's left to wander on its own. Let's leave when your follower is safe.
textByHash.0e0b0d7631b23806e5cd85b970a49b09a1fec3b7: Oh really? That would be great! I'll give you a small reward once we reach our destination.
textByHash.f51df8667fb8ef70b5c0194d70563bf48d049049: Ok, which route should we take?
textByHash.2e1197a074f654bd5cb5ecd5181910d79e0d7d75: Ah, so you want to give me some supplies, eh? Let me just open me backpack.
textByHash.d6b8ee8c82444f8f0c0bc0bb64cc9a0b58a399fb: This place is a bit grim. How can people live here?
textByHash.9d246b87081aeeb863eee2675a96c46864ddfb64: Do you visit Burgh de Rott often? You seem to know the route well.
textByHash.c630afe1eb18d83659ed347052803f251b5f8cff: When are we going to get to Burgh de Rott?
textByHash.8e8cfc6b6bccb7dea50cfca1cbd8817e1c17718d: We don't have all day to stand around chatting; let's press on. I have loot to get.
textByHash.01036fca2703a4afa2929d058969f69406bb4deb: Oh, I hate this trip, but it's better than the opulet life styles forced on us adventurer types. I'd much rather be up to my eyes in mud and having a good fight!
textByHash.e288d3c0baf13480ebb14903ed3d8c48ca55cee1: Can't you see I'm being attacked...
textByHash.a53d03bb57b7d38e3c08775b6a2369476e4533c3: Thanks, I'll get this down my neck.
textByHash.fa802b740f91bfebaad02180f061308f14f9e744: Blimey! Looks like we're going to have to go back to Paterdomus. We can't get over that bridge!
textByHash.83a61821040bc66675d3a8584c93349e44dd37d8: Well that's torn it... Looks like we can't get over this bog. We'll have to go back to Paterdomus.
textByHash.95f1ba6f0406655db1cc7da1972055529bf421c6: Hey...that's great...you did a great job...I'll follow you.
textByHash.507e83334e9eba44122c6d59f32df6294f0ef731: But we really should be heading off now.
textByHash.b9b71feb471abc683e1846a7277613d5564ca8be: That's amazing! I'll have to do the same.
textByHash.9e4c4df6b210f706d0285b22d7f27398c83a4095: [laugh]y! That was great! But we really should be heading off now.
textByHash.d8ca5e7200c92dfa2824a22125c54cbf08aa7993: Ahhh, that would be a tentacle...
textByHash.0d528f1c2690fcadd19254b7cdaceb6e36ce54ba: I think I'm going to faint!
textByHash.3b2dde707dc68f50744b635687a913ec337f75ba: Blimey! Look at that beast! You're gonna have to sort that thing out on your own!
textByHash.2ec096f7657c06edf604d6506a827332852fb0ab: Many thanks for getting me safely to the Burgh de Rott. Here's your reward.
